title: Daily Planner View for MyWork for 'This Week'
excerpt: It would be super helpful to have a 5-day daily planner view under mywork, so that tasks could be dragged and dropped across days of the week, as schedules and priorities need to react to changing schedules and circumsta…

posts.author: JessicaWM (Jessica Wilcock)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be super helpful to have a 5-day daily planner view under mywork, so that tasks could be dragged and dropped across days of the week, as schedules and priorities need to react to changing schedules and circumstances. I’ve had this in another PM platform and I used it multiple times a day. See attached screenshot from other PM platform as example.

Screen Shot 2023-11-29 at 12.44.57 PM1054×1856 76.4 KB

posts.author: JessicaWM (Jessica Wilcock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Todoist is another example of this.

Screen Shot 2023-12-11 at 10.14.01 AM1948×1942 175 KB

posts.author: jk193 (Jake K)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be even more helpful with google calendar integration to do time blocking/scheduling tasks, similar to clickup’s home screen calendar widget.
